message:
🐛 Fix KubeKart up-arrow movement and add FlappyPod start instructions (#10788)

- KubeKart: Added auto-straightening logic so Up arrow accelerates straight forward when no turn keys are pressed
- FlappyPod: Made start screen instructions larger, clearer, and more prominent with better visual hierarchy

Fixes #10770
Fixes #10774

Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
